prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge with warm wood interior. Yuna Moonvale 015, an androgynous ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, steadies a metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Ironleaf, a feminine ranger with a matching green half-cape, carefully guides a small repair tool over the shield surface. Warm golden forge light, cooperative teamwork, clear hand movements, cinematic depth, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, same characters and lighting. Yuna Moonvale 015 continues to hold the shield steady with focused attention. Yuna Ironleaf gently taps the final repair mark on the shield with her tool, completing the work. Friendly, calm interaction, consistent character appearance and environment, no text, no watermark.
